query: CHP olağanüstü kurultay çağrı heyeti Sulh Hukuk Mahkemesi başvuru karar - latest status as of late June / early July 2026. Has Özgür Özel's team filed the application under Civil Code Art 75 requesting appointment of a 3-person çağrı heyeti to convene a CHP extraordinary congress? Has any court issued a decision?
answer:
I've completed my research on the CHP olağanüstü kurultay çağrı heyeti Sulh Hukuk Mahkemesi application status.

## Summary of Key Findings

**Direct answer to the research question — as of late June / early July 2026:**

1. **Has the application been filed?** — **No.** Despite widespread media reports (~29 June) that Özel's team would apply "today," Özel's own legal advisor **Gül Çiftçi explicitly denied this to Odatv**, stating: *"we currently have not made an application... we will not make an application yet"* — deferring the filing pending unspecified "technical matters" (teknik hususlar), while affirming they will file if the congress isn't convened.

2. **Has any court issued a decision?** — **No** çağrı heyeti decision exists. The Sulh Hukuk Mahkemesi Art. 75 application was never filed, so there is nothing for it to rule on. (A separate 26 June İstinaf rejection concerned a different clarification request, not the çağrı heyeti.)

**Important context flag:** This is an inverted scenario from what one might assume. Following the **21 May 2026 "mutlak butlan" ruling**, Kılıçdaroğlu was reinstated as court-appointed chairman and now controls Genel Merkez, while **Özel is the challenger** collecting signatures (833 notarized, delivered 17 June; ~1,133 total claimed; Genel Merkez counts 820). The bylaw deadline for convening lapsed ~26–27 June, but Özel's team chose to hold off on the court filing.

All findings, sources, and quantitative data points have been recorded in the structured output. Note the data vintage: all sources date May–July 2026, and the situation is actively evolving.

sources.title: CHP'de gündem kurultay için 'çağrı heyeti': Başvuru bugün denilmişti ama... Gül Çiftçi Odatv'ye anlattı
sources.snippet: Özel's lawyer Gül Çiftçi: 'we currently have not made an application... we will not make an application yet' — çağrı heyeti filing deferred pending technical matters.
